reason: Completed the outward half of the constitutional circuit while preserving the living document as the canonical destination.

summary: Root Logos established a resumable, human-steered Cultivation Chamber that prompts, investigates, judges, and safely refactors its own constitutional structure.

reason: Enabled Root Logos to participate in its own corrigible growth while preserving human authority over semantic, policy, publication, and autonomy-boundary changes.
notes: The first autonomous refactorings integrated isolated questions without asserting answers. The 24-fragment attractor cycle remains independent and continues to preserve its v0.6 source provenance.
